tools.name: JSON
tools.title: JSON Formatter & Minifier
tools.description: Beautify, validate, or minify JSON entirely in your browser. Catch syntax errors with line and column hints, configure indent size, and copy output instantly.

tools.name: SQL
tools.title: SQL Formatter
tools.description: Format SQL queries across dialects including Postgres, MySQL, SQL Server, SQLite, BigQuery, Oracle, and more. Configure keyword case and indent size in browser.

tools.name: CSS
tools.title: CSS Formatter
tools.description: Beautify CSS with consistent indentation and rule structure. Cleans up minified stylesheets entirely in your browser — nothing is ever uploaded anywhere.

tools.name: SCSS
tools.title: SCSS Formatter
tools.description: Format SCSS and Sass with proper nesting and indentation. Cleans up partials, mixins, and nested selectors entirely in your browser — nothing is uploaded.

tools.name: JavaScript
tools.title: JavaScript Formatter
tools.description: Beautify JavaScript with Prettier-grade formatting. Handles modern ES syntax, JSX, and modules. Runs entirely in your browser — your code is never uploaded.

tools.name: TypeScript
tools.title: TypeScript Formatter
tools.description: Format TypeScript with Prettier, including type annotations, generics, decorators, and JSX. Runs entirely in your browser — your code is never uploaded.

tools.name: HTML / XML
tools.title: HTML & XML Formatter
tools.description: Pretty-print HTML and XML with proper indentation, attribute wrapping, and tag handling. Runs entirely in your browser — markup is never uploaded anywhere.

tools.name: JSON → YAML
tools.title: JSON to YAML Converter
tools.description: Convert JSON to YAML with optional key-case transformation — camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case, or PascalCase. Runs in your browser, your data never leaves.

tools.name: YAML → JSON
tools.title: YAML to JSON Converter
tools.description: Convert YAML to JSON with optional key-case transformation — camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case, or PascalCase. Runs in your browser, your data never leaves.

tools.name: Base64
tools.title: Base64 Encoder & Decoder
tools.description: Encode any text to Base64 or decode Base64 back to readable text. Full UTF-8 support and runs entirely in your browser — input never leaves your device.

tools.name: GUID / UUID
tools.title: GUID & UUID Generator
tools.description: Generate v4 UUIDs in batches with formatting options — uppercase, hyphens, braces, or quoted. Cryptographic randomness, runs entirely in your browser.

tools.name: Lorem Ipsum
tools.title: Lorem Ipsum Generator
tools.description: Generate Lorem Ipsum placeholder text by words, sentences, or paragraphs. Configurable length, copy to clipboard, and runs entirely in your browser locally.

tools.name: String Measure
tools.title: String Measure & Counter
tools.description: Count characters, words, sentences, lines, and bytes. View a per-character breakdown including whitespace and Unicode code points — all in your browser.

tools.name: Text Diff
tools.title: Text & File Diff Checker
tools.description: Compare two pieces of text or pasted files line-by-line. Highlights additions, removals, and changes side-by-side. Runs entirely in your browser, no upload.

categories.name: Time
categories.description: Work with time zones and timestamps.

tools.name: Time Zones
tools.title: Time Zone Converter
tools.description: Convert times between zones and see the current time around the world. Search by city or zone, pick a date and time, and view DST-aware conversions instantly.
